release_policy.release_owner_note: Only open a deployment window intentionally, then close it after production verification.

release_channels.label: Pull request review
release_channels.purpose: Review diffs, safety language, and public/private boundary

pre_release_checks: Public files do not expose provider, affiliate, apply, commission, routing, underwriting, credential, or borrower PII data.
Public pages avoid funding-decision, rate-promise, and speed-promise claims.
Browser-facing code does not import internal-only registries.
vercel.json remains unchanged unless explicitly authorized.

versioning.created_for: Am I Fundable / Funding Readiness Scorecard
